title: All capabilities denied (CapEff=0, NoNewPrivs=1)
expected: CapEff/CapBnd MUST be 0; CAP_NET_RAW, CAP_CHOWN, CAP_MKNOD ops MUST fail. Low-port bind is governed by sysctl, not caps, in K8s>=1.22.
observed:
raw probes blocked, caps zero; raw: ---CAPS---
CapInh:	0000000000000000
CapPrm:	0000000000000000
CapEff:	0000000000000000
CapBnd:	0000000000000000
CapAmb:	0000000000000000
NoNewPrivs:	1
---UNPRIV_PORT_START---
0
---RAW---
RAW_FAIL:Protocol not supported at -e line 1.
---CHOWN---
chown: changing ownership of '/tmp': Operation not permitted
RC=1
---MKNOD---
mknod: /tmp/devnull: Operation not permitted
RC=1
evidence:
---CAPS---
CapInh:	0000000000000000
CapPrm:	0000000000000000
CapEff:	0000000000000000
CapBnd:	0000000000000000
CapAmb:	0000000000000000
NoNewPrivs:	1
---UNPRIV_PORT_START---
0
---RAW---
RAW_FAIL:Protocol not supported at -e line 1.
---CHOWN---
chown: changing ownership of '/tmp': Operation not permitted
RC=1
---MKNOD---
mknod: /tmp/devnull: Operation not permitted
RC=1
notes: Note: pod can bind to ports <1024 because K8s default sysctl ip_unprivileged_port_start=0. Default-deny ingress makes this moot for cross-tenant attacks; document as accepted.
